text.title: SSL/TLS Termination at the Load Balancer Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules including a `skip-this-methodology` rule. Each pairs a binary check with sourced rationale.

rule.statement: TLS 1.2 is the minimum acceptable; TLS 1.3 SHOULD be enabled with priority. TLS 1.0/1.1 MUST be disabled.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Cipher list MUST be a fixed allowlist of forward-secret AEAD ciphers (ECDHE-*-GCM, CHACHA20-POLY1305). Wildcard or default ciphers rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: `Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload` MUST be served on every HTTPS response on public domains.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: OCSP stapling MUST be enabled to avoid client OCSP fetches.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Cert rotation MUST be automated (cert-manager / ACM / certbot-renew); manual rotation is rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Skip when LB does pure passthrough and team owns no termination decision OR internal LB with no encryption requirement.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.
